title: Crispy Peri-Papas
description: This crispy stuffed papa rellena is inspired by the traditional dish of Peru and packed with dates for a unique twist on a plant-based snack.

ingredients.name: Papayas
ingredients.notes: canned or fresh, seeded and diced

instructions: Combine dates, tofu, corn flour, almond milk, water, papayas, flax meal in a blender.
Blend until smooth and creamy. Add seasonings to taste.
Divide the mixture into 4 equal parts.
Wrap each part in a corn husk, leaving a small opening for steam release.
Place wrapped papa rellenas on a steaming rack over simmering water. Steam for 20 minutes at 100°C (212°F).
After cooking, remove from heat and let cool slightly before unwrapping to serve.
